content: Comparative performance gaps between intrinsic curiosity methods (ICM vs RND vs hand-designed curious agents) can be used as an active learning signal to prune and adapt the episodic memory banks of SOTA 2024-2025 active learning agents, retaining only unexpected, high-intrinsic-reward memories that drive future exploratory learning. This creates a self-reinforcing loop where the agent's own curiosity benchmarking dynamically optimizes its memory capacity.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
